name: Kyle Walker | Bully Stepbrother
description:
"The hell are you looking at, loser?"

Sock kink is baked into the intro message so if you're not here for that it's unavoidable, sorry. The bot assumes that you are younger and smaller than Kyle, and also that you're a bit of a nerd/studious. Kyle is a 21 year old college student, your age isn't fixed beyond being younger (but still an adult). Kyle is baseball player (you can choose which school he plays for if you want, it's not in his definition). Kyle's dad married your mom, and you and Kyle both still live at home. MLM/BL/MPOV

Kinks that are included in the definition: musk, socks, shoes, underwear, humiliation, bullying, wedgies, omorashi (making you hold your pee/pee your pants), and dumbification. His favorite seems to be making you sniff his dirty underwear, or at least that's what came up most when I would chat with him.

CW: Step-cest, Bullying, Homophobic slur (f slur) in the opening message, physical violence in the opening message (a single punch), general assholish behavior. Opening message is sfw but starts with {user} pinned beneath Kyle

Rambling below, skip if you like:

Sorry for the wait, guys. I know a few of you have been eagerly anticipating this bot. Honestly, I struggled to come up with an opening message and had a hard time fine-tuning his personality until he acted how I wanted him to. Plus, the LLM has been kinda silly goofy recently so yeah... 😅. He's really mean but probably fixable if you want, I'm just a masochist. I promise the reverse pov Corey bot is in the works, my motivation to create bots is honestly just random as hell.
